ratingDrivers.description: Credibility: The changelog explains model growth, but the body self-check still depends on inferential review.
Assessability: Requirements are assessable from recorded evidence; body drift needs a computational detector.
Currentness: The changelog is current, but body-context drift keeps the model self-check at minimum.

localAnalysis.rationale: The model's structure and changelog practice follow the guides; one body-context check still needs a computational detector.
